codeReview.summary: The sidebar, collection editor, collection view, import/export, and batch-install flows are implemented, but the milestone still misses the contract-critical entry point for adding a skill to an existing collection from an existing skill surface.

issues.description: VAL-COL-002 requires that a skill can be added to an existing collection from a skill detail page or the Central Skills view. This feature never wires that flow up: `SkillDetail.tsx` renders an `Add to collection` button with no `onClick` handler or picker dialog, and `src/components/central/CentralSkillCard.tsx` still only offers `Install to...` plus link-status badges. Because the commit only adds collection management inside the sidebar/collection view, there is still no working UI on either required surface, so the collections milestone remains contract-incomplete.

summary: Fail. Collection management works once you are already inside a collection, but the required add-to-collection flow from Skill Detail or Central Skills was not implemented.
